title: Sync documentation and workflow status
objective: Update required project documentation to reflect the corrected pool semantics and mark workflow progress.
requirements: Record that all item pools contain concrete objects only.
Describe conditional_items as visible, independently circleable, conditionally enabled objects.
Describe blocked_or_risky as concrete risky objects, while non-object phrases belong to forbidden pattern validation.
Do not churn .gitignore if no tracked cache cleanup is needed.
acceptance_criteria: Required docs are synchronized with implementation.
Verification commands and any limitations are captured in final execution notes.
verification: Review docs for consistency with data and tests.
git status --short to confirm only intended files changed.

result.summary: Updated required docs and workflow status to record the implemented itemization correction.
